scenarios.description: Seeds an isolated Tutor course and two scoped materials, then exercises a provider-free Tutor session over HTTP.
Seeds a wider isolated course library but narrows Tutor to one selected file with the coverage accuracy profile, then exercises provider-free scope shortcuts over HTTP.

notes: Hermetic Tutor scenarios use provider-free material-count and scope-list shortcuts so they do not require Obsidian state or live provider credentials.
